metadata.summary: 2D map: backbone left-to-right (journey), tasks vertically (priority). Walking skeleton = MVP end-to-end. Use verb phrases; 5-10 activities.

content.title: User Story Mapping
content.summary: 2D map with backbone journey and vertical task priorities. Walking skeleton defines MVP.

why.p: Flat backlogs lose journey context. Story map forces "How does backlog connect to user journey?" Walking skeleton defines earliest MVP.
